name: Performance Monitor HUD displays metrics and collapses
description: When the user is on the Preview tab and clicks the Activity (Performance Monitor) button, a floating HUD panel appears in the bottom-left corner showing Load Time, Memory usage with a progress bar, Code Size, and Engine type. The panel can be collapsed and dismissed.

planSteps.description: Click the second tab in the bottom dock to open the Preview view
Verify the preview pane is visible with a toolbar containing an Activity icon button (title 'لوحة الأداء')
Click the Activity (Performance Monitor) toggle button in the preview toolbar
Verify a floating Performance HUD panel appears in the bottom-left corner of the preview area
Verify the panel contains a 'Performance' header label
Verify the panel shows a 'Load Time' metric with a value in milliseconds (ms)
Verify the panel shows a 'Memory' metric with a value in MB and a colored progress bar
Verify the panel shows a 'Code Size' metric with a value in KB
Verify the panel shows an 'Engine' metric (either 'HTML5' or 'React')
Click the collapse button (chevron icon) in the Performance HUD header
Verify the panel body collapses, hiding the metrics but keeping the header visible
Click the Activity toggle button again to dismiss the Performance HUD entirely
Verify the Performance HUD panel is no longer visible
